room.caption: [G5-1C] Including one that said they're not very fond of Metroid games... this being their least favorite Gate... so I did well?

image_speed=0.33 soundToPlay=global.snd_MetItemGet stringToShow="You have obtained the High Jump Boots!#You can now jump higher!" fadingTime=70 boxSize=2
if global.gameProgress>=2760 instance_destroy()
